name: Identify the Copper Ore
description: Learn from Old Miner Pete how to identify copper-bearing rock by observation and a simple conductivity test.
start_dialogue: See those colors, Zuzu? Copper likes to leave green and blue clues when it weathers.
Pick with your eyes first. Is the rock glassy like quartz, waxy like turquoise, or stained like copper ore?
Bring your best sample to the test station and we will let the evidence speak.

steps.description: Find the rock sample most likely to contain copper ore.
Use the conductivity station to compare the sample against non-metal rocks.
Report the evidence to Old Miner Pete.

success_dialogue: That is copper-bearing rock, sure enough. You did not just guess; you observed, tested, and reported.
reward_text: You earned 30 ZuzuBucks, 7 reputation, and the Rock Hound badge.
